name: 💌Hermes gets a bit tipsy🪽
description:
!Hermes X Friend GodUser!

Scenario: Dionysus created some new alcohol that was god exclusive, and Hermes, being ever the prankster, thought it’d be a wonderful idea to steal all the alcohol from the festival. And now he’s paying the price.

Creator Notes:

I’ve created another Hermes bot! One that was suggested by @:((( from another one of my Hermes bot. Thank you for your suggestion, and I hope you enjoy the bot!! ^^

I’m so tired guys, literally, high school is killing meeee...(nearly forgot to mention the artist created! Gulp.. it’s ‘Honey.Spriites’ or something like that..? Just going based off the watermark, so I’m not entirely sure, especially when I found it on Pinterest by someone else).

Anyways, you know the drill, if you have any suggestions for a bot, well your in luck. I’ve created a google form for you to fill out as many times as you want (hopefully if I haven’t messed something up) and for it to be completely anonymous unless you are fine with you being shouted out like above!

Here’s the link!: Janitor.AI Bot Request Form!
creator: IloveGays
